hero.text: Believe in the magic of new beginnings.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Today is a day for taking charge, Aries! Trust your instincts and take the lead.
aries.love: Romance may surprise you today. Be open to spontaneous moments with your partner.
aries.career: A project you've been working on may finally come to fruition. Celebrate your hard work!

taurus.general: Patience is key today, Taurus. Don't rush into decisions without thinking them through.
taurus.love: A deep conversation with a loved one can strengthen your bond. Listen closely.
taurus.career: Be cautious with financial matters. Review details to avoid potential pitfalls.

gemini.general: Your social life is buzzing today, Gemini! Engage with friends and share ideas.
gemini.love: New connections are likely. Be open to opportunity in romance.
gemini.career: Work collaborations can lead to innovative solutions. Share your insights!

cancer.general: Emotional healing is on the horizon. Take time to nurture yourself today.
cancer.love: Express your feelings honestly to your partner for deeper understanding.
cancer.career: Focus on team dynamics at work. Your empathy will lead to improved collaboration.

leo.general: Your charisma shines today, Leo! Embrace opportunities to shine in the spotlight.
leo.love: Passion is in the air! Surprise your partner with a romantic gesture.
leo.career: Recognition for your hard work is coming. Be confident in showcasing your achievements.

virgo.general: Today is favorable for organization and planning. Reflect on your goals.
virgo.love: Take a step back. Reassess what you want from your relationships.
virgo.career: A meticulous approach will yield results in your work. Double-check your details.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: It's not about having time. It's about making time.
professional.author: Unknown

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

captions.text: Rise and shine! Today is a fresh start.
captions.author: Unknown

captions.text: Embrace the glorious mess that you are.
captions.author: Elizabeth Gilbert

captions.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
captions.author: Walt Whitman

captions.text: Life is short, and it's up to you to make it sweet.
captions.author: Sarah Louise Delany

captions.text: Be a voice, not an echo.
captions.author: Unknown

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.
tech.author: Albert Einstein

tech.text: The great growling engine of change—technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

tech.text: Your most unhappy customers are your greatest source of learning.
tech.author: Bill Gates

fun.text: Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all.
fun.author: Helen Keller

fun.text: Absolutely, do what you love and love what you do!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: A day without laughter is a day wasted.
fun.author: Charlie Chaplin

fun.text: Why so serious? Make sure to enjoy the ride!
fun.author: Unknown

fun.text: To be happy, we must not be too concerned with others.
fun.author: Albert Camus

fun.text: Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
fun.author: Unknown

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
faith.author: Theodore Roosevelt

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: When you have faith, you can see the impossible.
faith.author: Catherine Pulsifer

faith.text: The soul that is within me no man can degrade.
faith.author: Frederick Douglass

faith.text: To have faith is to trust yourself to the water. When you swim, you don’t grab hold of the water; instead, you relax, and float.
faith.author: A.W. Tozer

wisdom.text: Wise men speak because they have something to say; fools because they have to say something.
wisdom.author: Plato

wisdom.text: We do not remember days, we remember moments.
wisdom.author: Cesare Pavese

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle

wisdom.text: A wise person should have money in their head, but not in their heart.
wisdom.author: Jonathan Swift
